title: Actions & Java
description: This modpack makes your Minecraft Java look very similar to Minecraft Bedrock's Action & Stuff
body:
This modpack transforms Minecraft: Java Edition to look and feel like Minecraft: Bedrock Edition, while keeping all the flexibility, compatibility, and power that make Java unique.

It was created by taking inspiration from the Action & Stuff mod found in Bedrock, recreating its smooth style and gameplay feel through a combination of textures, animations, and visual improvements.

Some of the most notable additions include:
-More fluid and realistic character animations, similar to Bedrock’s movement style.
-3D item models that add depth and detail to your inventory and world.
-Enhanced enchantment glint effects, with a brighter and more modern shimmer on weapons and tools.
-A clean, Bedrock-inspired interface, featuring clearer menus and a more polished look.
- Smoother and more responsive movement, with subtle camera and animation adjustments.
- Improved lighting and shadows, giving the world a more natural and immersive atmosphere.

In short, this modpack brings the smooth visuals and modern polish of Bedrock Edition into Java Edition, without sacrificing performance, customization, or freedom — the perfect blend for players who want the best of both worlds.
